nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Sodium (Astrocaryum Vulgare/Euterpe Oleraceae/Palm) Fruit/(Astrocaryum Vulgare/Palm) Kernel/(Astrocaryum Murumuru/Babassu/Bertholletia Excelsa/Carapa Guianensis/Cocoa/Fevillea Trilobata/Passiflora Edulis/Theobroma Grandiflorum) Seedate
chemicalDescription: Sodium (Astrocaryum Vulgare/Euterpe Oleraceae/Palm) Fruit/(Astrocaryum Vulgare/Palm) Kernel/(Astrocaryum Murumuru/Babassu/Bertholletia Excelsa/Carapa Guianensis/Cocoa/Fevillea Trilobata/Passiflora Edulis/Theobroma Grandiflorum) Seedate is the product obtained by the sodium hydroxide saponification of the oils derived from the fruit of Astrocaryum vulgare , Elaeis guianeensis (palm), and Euterpe oleraceae ; the kernels of Astrocaryum vulgare , and Elaeis guianeensis (palm); the seeds of Astrocaryum murumuru , Bertholletia excelsa , Carapa guianensis , Fevillea trilobata , Orbignya speciosa (babassu), Passiflora edulis , Theobroma cacao (cocoa), and Theobroma grandiflorum.
inciName: SODIUM (ASTROCARYUM VULGARE/EUTERPE OLERACEAE/PALM) FRUIT/(ASTROCARYUM VULGARE/PALM) KERNEL/(ASTROCARYUM MURUMURU/BABASSU/BERTHOLLETIA EXCELSA/CARAPA GUIANENSIS/COCOA/FEVILLEA TRILOBATA/PASSIFLORA EDULIS/THEOBROMA GRANDIFLORUM) SEEDATE
